hooks.command: bash -c 'echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE "app/auth/|migrations/" && echo "BLOCKED: FROZEN zone — requires Dev Lead approval" && exit 2 || exit 0'
bash -c 'echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE "git commit" && cd backend && flake8 app/ && exit 0 || exit 0'
bash -c 'echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qiE "rm -rf /|--force.*push.*main|DROP TABLE" && echo "BLOCKED: Dangerous command" && exit 2 || exit 0'
bash -c 'echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qiE "fastapi|from fastapi" && echo "BLOCKED: Use Flask, not FastAPI — see CONSTITUTION.md" && exit 2 || exit 0'
